vectors.description: OP_0 opcode — single-byte script hex 0x00

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromHex — OP.OP_0 is buf[0]=0; Script.fromHex parses to 1 chunk with op===0

vectors.description: OP_CHECKMULTISIG opcode — single-byte script hex 0xae

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromBinary — OP.OP_CHECKMULTISIG=0xae=174; parsed to 1 chunk

vectors.description: 3-byte data push — script bytes [0x03, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03]

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromBinary — [3, 1, 2, 3] parses to 1 data chunk containing [1,2,3]

vectors.description: P2PKH locking script — standard 25-byte script for a zero pubkey hash

expected.note: LockingUnlockingScript.test.ts — OP_DUP=0x76, OP_HASH160=0xa9, PUSH20=0x14, OP_EQUALVERIFY=0x88, OP_CHECKSIG=0xac

vectors.description: OP_1 script — minimal push of value 1

expected.note: script.valid.vectors.ts — '51' is OP_1; Script.fromHex('51').toHex() === '51'

vectors.description: scriptSig 5152 / scriptPubKey 52885187 — valid P2SH,STRICTENC evaluation

expected.note: script.valid.vectors.ts — ['5152', '52885187', 'P2SH,STRICTENC'] is a valid script pair

vectors.description: Script evaluation — empty scriptSig with scriptPubKey 740087 (OP_TUCK OP_TOALTSTACK OP_NOP) — valid

expected.note: script.valid.vectors.ts first vector ['', '740087', 'P2SH,STRICTENC']

vectors.description: fromHex throws for odd-length hex string

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts: Script.fromHex('abc') throws for odd-length input

vectors.description: fromHex throws for non-hex characters

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts: Script.fromHex('gggg') throws for non-hex input

vectors.description: OP_PUSHDATA1 — script with 76-byte data push uses OP_PUSHDATA1 encoding

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeBin: 76-byte data → OP_PUSHDATA1 (0x4c=76)

vectors.description: OP_PUSHDATA2 — script with 256-byte data push uses OP_PUSHDATA2 encoding

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeBin: 256-byte data → OP_PUSHDATA2 (0x4d=77)

vectors.description: OP_PUSHDATA1 with 0 bytes of data — empty payload

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromBinary — OP_PUSHDATA1 (76) with no length byte → empty data chunk

vectors.description: OP_PUSHDATA2 with 3 bytes of data — [77, 3, 0, 1, 2, 3]

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromBinary — OP_PUSHDATA2 with LE length 3

vectors.description: OP_PUSHDATA4 with 3 bytes of data — [78, 3, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, 3]

expected.note: Script.test.ts fromBinary — OP_PUSHDATA4 (78) with 4-byte LE length

vectors.description: writeBn(0) produces OP_0

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeBn: BigNumber(0) → OP_0 (opcode 0)

vectors.description: writeBn(-1) produces OP_1NEGATE

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeBn: BigNumber(-1) → OP_1NEGATE (0x4f=79)

vectors.description: writeBn(1..16) produces OP_1..OP_16

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeBn: 1→OP_1(81), 16→OP_16(96); OP_1+n-1

vectors.description: writeScript appends all chunks from another script

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts writeScript: s1.writeScript(s2) concatenates chunks

vectors.description: setChunkOpCode replaces opcode at given index

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts setChunkOpCode: script.setChunkOpCode(1, OP.OP_NOP); chunks[1].op === OP_NOP(97)

vectors.description: findAndDelete removes PUSHDATA1-encoded chunks matching target

expected.note: Script.additional.test.ts findAndDelete: removes 2 PUSHDATA1 chunks; OP_1 remains
